messages.body: Hi! Thank you for contacting Che’ Nova Aesthetics. I’m currently with a client and unable to answer right now, but I’d still love to assist you. You’re welcome to submit a skincare inquiry here: https://www.chenova.net/s…

Hey Che, The redirection usually gets affected whenever there’s a pending payment for the month. Once the payment is processed, the redirection automatically starts working again since it’s part of an integrated system.

Hi Che Nova, I hope you are well. We haven't been able to authorise your payment. Here's the payment link for you to make the payment: https://public.zoca.com/missed/payment/51391323-c356-4c80-bfca-a616c2c2d24e Leads get…
And I informed you that most of these leads were consultations, which were free

If a client wants to book, I don’t want them to have to fill out a form. I want them to book directly without me having to contact them.
Some Client select the book online option and it will take them directly through Vagaro. But if they select make an appointment, it takes them through Zoca and at that point it gets confusing.
When was my subscription supposed to renew?
If a client wants to book a service, they should not have to fill out a form and be sent to me as a lead they should be able to book directly
And some of the leads aren’t even coming through right now. The form that I just submitted did not come through on my end as a lead

What you guys do is have them submit their information and then I have to contact them or they will reschedule a online consultation, as if that’s their only option at the moment this is not good for my business
